references.text: Meijden, R van der & N Caspers. 1971. Haloragaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 7: 259-263. (page reference excludes Haloragaceae sensu stricto, covered in pp. 239-259)
Wanntorp, L, HE Wanntorp, B Oxelman& M Källersjö. 2001. Phylogeny of Gunnera. Plant Systematics and Evolution, 226: 85-107.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 20 May 2025

species.citation: Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826) 513 ; Fern.-Villar, Novis. App. (1880) 78; S.Vidal, Rev. Pl. Vasc. Filip. (1886) 125; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 221; Meijden & Caspers, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 262.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, New Guinea, Philippines, Solomon Isls, Sulawesi, Sumatra. CAMIGUIN, LUZON: Albay, Apayao (photos), Benguet, Ifugao, Laguna, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, Pangasinan, Quezon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato (photos), NEGROS.
species.notes: Along streams, seepage slopes and damp ridges, mostly on open or semi-shaded sites in disturbed habitats, colonizing bare lands, often gregarious. (750-)1000-3000m.
